name: DOT/FMCSA Compliance
description: MCP server that makes DOT/FMCSA trucking regulations queryable by AI agents. Covers 49 CFR Parts 350-399 (FMCSA), Hazardous Materials (49 CFR 100-185), Hours of Service, and CSA BASIC categories.

tools.name: lookup_dot_standard
tools.description: Search 49 CFR standards by topic, keyword, or section number

tools.name: get_hos_rules
tools.description: Hours of Service rules for property, passenger, and hazmat carriers

tools.name: get_violation_info
tools.description: FMCSA violation codes, severity weights, BASIC categories

tools.name: get_dot_penalties
tools.description: Current DOT penalty amounts by violation category

tools.name: get_hazmat_info
tools.description: Hazmat classifications, labeling, placarding, training requirements

tools.name: check_csa_basic
tools.description: CSA BASIC categories, intervention thresholds, severity ratings
